name: Eric Greitens
subject: First 75
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri,
body:
We've accomplished so much in the first 75 days, but there's still so much work left to be done. We still must work together to bring more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools to all Missourians. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)
---
Peter,

Saturday marked the 75th day since I took the oath of office on January 9, 2017.

Peter, with your support, we won in November and took back the Governor's office. The people of Missouri wanted an outsider - not a career politician.

Since taking the oath of office, together we have:
* **Banned lobbyist gifts.** Executive branch employees can no longer accept gifts from lobbyists.
* **Made Missouri the 28th Right-to-Work State.** We signed legislation that gives Missouri workers more freedom and opportunity - and leads to more jobs!
* **Fought to keep "abortion sanctuary cities" out of Missouri.** As Governor, I will always protect life and defend people of faith who protect the unborn.
* **Shown the Nation our heart and how we can all come together after the horrific vandalism of the cemetery.**

We've accomplished so much in the first 75 days, but there's still much left to be done. We continue fighting together to bring more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools to all Missourians.

**[Peter, that's why I am reaching out to you. Will you join me again and become an official 2017 member of "Our Team of Outsiders?"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r) **

| [** Yes, I'll stand with
The Conservative Outsider! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)
---

Making real, lasting conservative change in America is going to take strong leadership - _but it doesn't start or end with just one person_.

>From my four deployments as a U.S. Navy SEAL, I've learned first-hand that we can only achieve excellence with the help of a team. I always knew there was someone to my left and someone to my right that was counting on me. Peter, I know now YOU are counting on me to lead Missouri and set an example for the rest of the nation of what good leadership can accomplish. **But I also know that without your help, our mission isn't possible.**

**[Join our mission to take our state in a new direction by following this link and making a secure campaign contribution of $10 or more right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)**

As part of our team, you're sending a clear message. Your mission is to end politics as usual. Your mission is to take government back from typical career politicians. Your mission is to change what it means to be in politics.

Peter, I am fighting for you. I know we can complete the mission to bring meaningful, conservative change to our state if you join me today. **[Can I count on you?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)**

Sincerely,

Eric Greitens
Governor of Missouri

P.S. As a U.S. Navy SEAL I learned the importance of completing a mission - and it starts with having trust in your team to have your back. In the first 75 days, we've already taken on so many important issues together. But I need your help to continue down this path of conservative reform. **[Become part of our team once again by joining our team of outsiders by chipping in $10 or more today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)**

[** Yes, I'll stand with
The Conservative Outsider! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41378195:skZvJ0lfN:m:1:1531626645:D5D7C724FD1A3D8B42EC437D7655DF3F:r)
---

| Paid for by Greitens for Missouri,
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
---

This information does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/27/2017. |

**FEATURED**
Watch President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation:
[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1a05e4a96fc89c65734e88b824e7a229647af6de00ec915f88d4f0c8fa8340a5424ca7b21a3d291b2fa421a018ce2cd533279a05ecc2f271)

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
The President will keep working with Congress, with every agency, and most importantly, with the American people, until we eliminate every unnecessary, harmful, and job-killing regulation we can find. It’s all about jobs.

**MORNING:**
* **11:00AM** : President Trump participates in a roundtable with women small business owners

**AFTERNOON:**
* **3:00PM** : President Trump signs H.J.Res. 37, H.J.Res. 44, H.J.Res. 57 and H.J.Res. 58.

**Get Involved**
President Trump is focused on reducing regulations and creating jobs for all Americans.
[Stand with President Trump and Support Getting Americans Back to Work. Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1a05e4a96fc89c65237460f9e5da9cff8357f2d83cc196f4b66e1f73cf963b0afe8803ba6983b46cffba54f794489e9b61003b0dda433da5)

**OVAL OFFICE HIGHLIGHTS**
President Trump makes remarks at a jobs announcement with Charter Communications.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1a05e4a96fc89c653bed9a4a504a4ed17d2f6ec99a37867af5a08516556d41b7d2a54fbd340dcc7c79b7189bf10b80654addb01032725a68)

President Trump makes remarks at the TransCanada Keystone XL Pipeline announcement.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1a05e4a96fc89c652a09a9779a9ebeab9423dffc03ec350bd5630de3fc18c648ef8ecc0462a22fda42c3f75f2cada85cd91d819ac93d0e99)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
**Photo of the Day:**

**PRESS ROOM**
Today's press briefing will take place at 1:30PM ET in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer. [Watch it LIVE here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1a05e4a96fc89c650348865e95099106122fc57b1ff79fcf309e16b64cdfe1fec7d390aed67cf8b2fdac45b0afb3ba545de78e142123632a)

name: just-launched@dscc.org
subject: We're going to resist, friend. Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're more than halfway through President Trump's first 100 days in office, and Senate Democrats have fought every fight to stop his radical agenda.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170327-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

We're more than halfway through President Trump's first 100 days in office, and Senate Democrats have fought every fight to stop his radical agenda.

It's because nevertheless, Democratic Senators persist to go to the mat every day for our core values, from confronting any Republican attempt to rubberstamp Trump's extreme policies to filibustering his far-right Supreme Court nominee.

A recent victory speaks volumes about our efforts: grassroots pressure forced Republicans to abandon their vote on Obamacare repeal -- thousands made it possible by helping blast our "gut punch" of an ad that exposed its dangerous consequences to swing-state voters.

And now, on the heels of this momentum, the biggest test of the cycle is here: the first FEC quarterly deadline that will show everyone how ready we are to keep our Senate Democrats fighting.

**[We're setting an aggressive goal of $450,000 by Friday, friend. Will you chip in $1 towards our Democratic Resistance Fund before the FEC deadline?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170327-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170327-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Democrats aren't backing down from tough fights. But with each act of resistance, you can bet GOP special interests are targeting the Senate -- already, Donald Trump is on the campaign trail asking billionaires to deliver a filibuster-proof majority (not to mention the six-figure ad blitzes against Democrats that he asks his supporters to fund).

That means we need to start our groundwork early to defend 25 Democrats in the 2018 midterms, including 10 defending their seats in Trump states.

Finishing the FEC quarter strong is our first step. It's also our opportunity to send a loud message about how committed we are to fighting back in the Trump era.

**Can we count on you to step up, friend? Chip in $1 toward our Democratic Resistance Fund to show you 're standing with the Senators holding our best, last line of defense:**

**[http://dscc.org/democratic-resistance-fund](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170327-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for being part of this,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2c1/2b07114c/58cb85a5/736b65ea/1422498042/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2c1/2b07114c/58cb85a5/736b65e5/1422498042/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2c1/2b07114c/58cb85a5/736b65e4/1422498042/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:
The President was surprised you weren’t on the list. |

Friend, We wanted to be sure you saw this message from President Trump. Your name was brought up recently as a top supporter who hasn’t yet activated your 2017 Sustaining Membership. You were a major part of our movement, and before we give the President our most recent list of names we wanted to be sure you had a chance to activate for 2017 -- our flagship year and the most important time to step up and show your support. Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. We’re working to enact a bold America First agenda that works for the people, Friend, and President Trump needs your support now more than ever. Thank you, Trump Headquarters 2017 Membership Team ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: March 26, 2017 Subject: You’re on record To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, We’re working to advance our agenda every day. I need to know you’re committed to a stronger and safer America. This is your last chance to update your record before the first quarter is over. That’s why I need you to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year.
dpwillis67@gmail.com Account Number: 328999-2017 2017 Sustaining Membership: PENDING Activation Deadline: March 31, 11:59 PM ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. I’ve requested a list of every person who has stepped up and activated their 2017 Sustaining Memberships before the March 31 deadline, and I hope to see your name at the top, Friend. Activating your 2017 Sustaining Membership is about more than our movement. This is about a better future for all of us. We cannot allow the Fake News Media to flood the airwaves and mislead the American people. I need you on my team, Friend. Accept your membership today. Thank you, Donald J. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: This is possible
body:
#
Team -
Since we launched this campaign for Governor of Florida just a few weeks ago, we've seen something that the pundits have insisted no longer exists in politics: **a belief in the possibility of progress.**
We've seen it in the messages we've received on social media, from volunteers who worked on campaigns during the last election cycle, and are already fired up and ready to start knocking doors for our campaign. Everyday Floridians **believe** they can make a difference.
We're seeing it as the contributions roll in from nearly 3,000 online donors, at an average contribution of less than $50. [**If you 'd like to become one of those people, you can do so right here, right now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035905/827596974/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-march2017?refcode=em20170327-belief-a")
And we saw it last week, when the Republicans failed to repeal the Affordable Care Act, President Obama's healthcare plan that covers millions of Americans, and millions here in Florida.
Today, I want to encourage each and every one of you to keep on believing, because I know we can accomplish great things together. **We still believe it is possible to strengthen Obamacare, and make sure that Florida finally gets to experience its full benefits by expanding Medicaid to cover those who currently fall in the gap.**
We believe it is still possible to rebuild Florida into a state where teachers are given the opportunity to give the best education possible to our students, where we trust them to make their own lesson plans, provide them the resources they need to build their classrooms, and pay them the salary they deserve - because our kids deserve nothing less.
We believe it is still possible to make progress in our fights for equal rights for all on the state level -- no matter the color of your skin, your nation of origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, ability, age, or class. **Yes, we believe it is still possible to make this progress even during the Trump presidency.**
[**If you still believe in doing everything we can to make these dreams a reality, to keep this belief alive, please contribute to our insurgent campaign now >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035905/827596974/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-march2017?refcode=em20170327-belief-a")
Together, we're going to rebuild Florida. I can't wait.
Bring it home,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035905/827596974/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-march2017?refcode=em20170327-belief-a")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035904/827596974/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035907/827596974/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33d2/9e00690/49597912/24035906/827596974/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: First, train thousands of women to run >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ddb/24c69fd9/f216b431/18e3fad7/3709433780/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all")
---

Peter,

When this community bands together, it always blows me away.

Last week, we hit a major milestone -- over 10,000 women have now reached out to us since Election Day about running for office. OVER. TEN. THOUSAND. From every single state and D.C. too.

That's the work of thousands of people who've told a woman in their life she should run, and thousands of women who've had the courage to say they'll give it a go. We're building a massive movement that, if successful, will permanently change the face of government.

But for these women to win, they're going to need resources. So we're setting a big goal for our first End-of-Quarter of 2017.

**[Donate $3 today to help hit our End-of-Quarter goal of $180,000 and support the movement we're building.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ddb/24c69fd9/f216b431/18e3fad0/3709433780/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+help+hit+our+EndofQuar&utm_campaign=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all")**

This is where resources will go to help these women win:

First, we need to train thousands of potential candidates on how to run for office. Next we'll help them figure out where and when to run. We'll then help their campaigns get up and running, and support them financially when we can. It's going to take a lot of work, but that's why we've set an ambitious goal.

Because this isn't just about one quarter or one deadline. It's about supporting an outpouring of interest in running for office that could lead to electing more women than ever before.

We can do it, but we're going to need everyone to play a part.

**Donate $3 to help hit our End-of-Quarter goal and elect more pro-choice Democratic women than ever:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-The-March-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ddb/24c69fd9/f216b431/18e3fad1/3709433780/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitTheMarchGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ddb/24c69fd9/f216b431/18e3fad2/3709433780/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE328N_digital_email_20170327_EOQLaunch_n-all")
